name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-6
title: Verify settings.json updates route through /rabbit-config with scope guard override prompt; file bug if not
description: When updating .claude/settings.json, the expected flow is to invoke /rabbit-config, which should surface an explicit scope guard override prompt before any write. Need to audit whether the current implementation enforces this path and file a bug if it is non-compliant.

history.note: Resolved by PR #103 (BUG-10): settings.json removed from scope-guard basename allowlist. Writes to .claude/settings.json now require an active rabbit-cage scope marker. rabbit-config only writes to settings.local.json (still allowlisted). Scope-guard enforcement is the compliance mechanism — no additional routing fix needed.
